Our COLORBONDÂŽ steel Roofing Restoration Process

  1. Install safety rails and cover roof section by section to ensure no water gets in
  2. Pressure clean the roof to clean off dirt, mould or grime
  3. Screws - replace screws where required
  4. Roof Sheets - replace roof sheets where required
  5. Apply rust solution to treat affected areas and ensure ongoing protection
  6. Spray the roof using a 3 coat metal application process
  7. Quality check the job and get sign off
  8. Clean up any mess we made, leaving the job site clean and tidy

  • Increased home value â the appearance a roof greatly improves the look of your home and adds value.
  • Low maintenance â your roof will rarely need maintenance for decades.
